## Summary

When a user demands "100% delivery" or "ship everything now" on scope that exceeds session capacity at quality bar, reply with the honest-scope framing:…

## Description

When a user demands "100% delivery" or "ship everything now" on scope that exceeds session capacity at quality bar, reply with the honest-scope framing: explicit what-I-can-ship vs what's-deferred. Cite the quality-bar rule. Don't ship hacks.

## Invoke

Use **quality-bar-honest**.

## Triggers / keywords

`set-quality`, `enforce-bar`, `reject-shortcut`
